verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Take a stand. Take a stand. Take a stand. If I'll never ever see you anymore, Take a stand. Take a stand. Take a stand. I'll see you in Canaan's shore.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Preach the word. Preach the word. Preach the word. If I'll never ever see you anymore, Preach the word. Preach the word. Preach the word. I'll see you in Canaan's shore.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Shake a hand. Shake a hand. Shake a hand. If I'll never ever see you anymore Shake a hand. Shake a hand. Shake a hand. I'll see you in Canaan's shore.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Love the truth. Love the truth. Love the truth. If I'll never ever see you anymore, Love the truth. Love the truth. Love the truth. I'll see you in Canaan's shore.
